title: helichrysum rupestre subsp. valentinum
intro: Helichrysum rupestre subsp. valentinum, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum rupestre subsp. valentinum include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as an essential oil or in herbal teas and infusions for its therapeutic benefits.
